2604.01001.title: EgoSim: Egocentric World Simulator for Embodied Interaction Generation
2604.01001.paper_summary: We introduce EgoSim, a closed-loop egocentric world simulator that generates spatially consistent interaction videos and persistently updates the underlying 3D scene state for continuous simulation. Existing egocentric simulators either lack explicit 3D grounding, causing structural drift under viewpoint changes, or treat the scene as static, failing to update world states across multi-stage interactions. EgoSim addresses both limitations by modeling 3D scenes as updatable world states. We generate embodiment interactions via a Geometry-action-aware Observation Simulation model, with spatial consistency from an Interaction-aware State Updating module. To overcome the critical data bottleneck posed by the difficulty in acquiring densely aligned scene-interaction training pairs, we design a scalable pipeline that extracts static point clouds, camera trajectories, and embodiment actions from in-the-wild large-scale monocular egocentric videos. We further introduce EgoCap, a capture system that enables low-cost real-world data collection with uncalibrated smartphones. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EgoSim significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of visual quality, spatial consistency, and generalization to complex scenes and in-the-wild dexterous interactions, while supporting cross-embodiment transfer to robotic manipulation. Codes and datasets will be open soon. The project page is at egosimulator.github.io.
2604.01001.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了EgoSim，一個閉環的自我中心世界模擬器，能生成空間一致的互動視頻並持續更新基礎的3D場景狀態以進行連續模擬。現有的自我中心模擬器要麼缺乏明確的3D基礎，導致在視點變化下出現結構漂移，要麼將場景視為靜態，無法在多階段互動中更新世界狀態。EgoSim通過將3D場景建模為可更新的世界狀態來解決這兩個限制。我們通過一個幾何動作感知的觀察模擬模型生成具身互動，並通過一個互動感知的狀態更新模塊實現空間一致性。為了克服由於獲取密集對齊的場景互動訓練對而造成的關鍵數據瓶頸，我們設計了一個可擴展的管道，從野外的大規模單目自我中心視頻中提取靜態點雲、相機軌跡和具身動作。我們進一步介紹了EgoCap，一個捕捉系統，能夠使用未校準的智能手機進行低成本的現實世界數據收集。大量實驗表明，EgoSim在視覺質量、空間一致性以及對複雜場景和野外靈巧互動的泛化能力方面顯著超越現有方法，同時支持跨具身轉移到機器人操作。代碼和數據集將很快開放。項目頁面位於 egosimulator.github.io。
2604.01001.author: Jinkun Hao et.al.
2604.01001.authors: Jinkun Hao, Mingda Jia, Ruiyan Wang, Xihui Liu, Ran Yi, Lizhuang Ma, Jiangmiao Pang, Xudong Xu
